5.2 在方法initModelByReq增加对PartConstraintReqs的处理


   private void  addPartConstraintReqs(module,req.partConstraintReqs) {
	
		for( PartConstraintReq partConstraintReq :req.partConstraintReqs) {
			PartCategory partCatagory = module.getParaCategory(partConstraintReq.partCatagory);
			List<Part>  filterParts = partCatagory.query(partConstraintReq).getParts();	
			partCatagory.parseAttribute(partConstraintReq.attrCode) ->result 
			根据result.second 构建约束表达式
			如果result.second == AttrFunConstant.FUN_PREFIX_SUM， 
			 alg.sumFunConstaint( filterParts,  result.sumAttrCode, partConstraintReq.attrComparator，partConstraintReq.attrValue); 
				
	}




6、对类ConstraintAlgImpl做下列更新
6.1 现有的   protected PartVar createPartVar(String code)  重构为两个函数：

   protected PartVar createPartVar(String code) {
        Optional<Part> partOpt = module != null ? module.getPart(code) : Optional.empty();
        if (!partOpt.isPresent()) {
            log.error("Part not found for code: {}", code);
            throw new AlgLoaderException("Part not found for code: " + code);
        }
        Part part = partOpt.get();
		if(Part instanceof PartCatagory) {
				partVar = createPartCategoryVar(
		 }
		 partVar = createPartVar(part);
		return partVar;
		
   }
	protected PartVar createPartVar(Part part) {
		//现有代码。。。
    }

    protected PartVar createPartCategoryVar(PartCatagory categoryPart) {
        PartCatagoryVar partCategoryVar = new PartCatagoryVar();
        partVar.setBase(categoryPart);
        for(Part part: categoryPart.partMap.values) {
			createPartVar(part);
		}
		for(PartCatagory tcategoryPart: categoryPart.partCategoryMap.values) {
			createPartCategoryVar(tcategoryPart);
		} 
	}
	

6.2 添加一个sumFunConstaint 
	void sumFunConstaint(List<Part> sumParts, String sumAttrCode, String comparator，int leftValue) {

			IntVar sumFunVar = ....
			for(Part part: sumParts) {

				sumFunVar = sumFunVar + partVar.qty *  toInt( part.getAttr(sumAttrCode));
			}
			sumFunVar comparator leftValue
	}

```diff
      /**
       * 打印其他变量的短名称信息
-      * 
+      *
       * @param solutions 解决方案列表
       * @param sb        字符串构建器
```

**Chunk 2**
Lines added: 73, lines removed: undefined

```diff
@@ -621,3 +621,76 @@
          }
      }
+ 
+     /**
+      * 将字符串约束请求转换为PartConstraintReq列表
+      *
+      * @param partCategory 部件类别
+      * @param strReqs      字符串约束请求数组，格式如："sum.Quantity ==2 where Speed=540"
+      * @return PartConstraintReq列表
+      */
+     protected List&lt;PartConstraintReq&gt; toPartConstraintReqs(String partCategory, String... strReqs) {
+         List&lt;PartConstraintReq&gt; reqs = new ArrayList&lt;&gt;();
+ 
+         for (String strReq : strReqs) {
+             PartConstraintReq req = new PartConstraintReq();
+             req.setPartCategory(partCategory);
+ 
+             // 解析格式：attrCode comparator value where condition
+             // 示例："sum.Quantity ==2 where Speed=540"
+             String[] parts = strReq.split(" where ");
+             if (parts.length == 2) {
+                 req.setAttrWhereCondition(parts[1]);
+             } else if (parts.length != 1) {
+                 throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid constraint format: " + strReq);
+             }
+ 
+             // 解析属性表达式：attrCode comparator value
+             String attrExpr = parts[0].trim();
+             // 使用正则表达式解析：支持==, !=, &lt;, &gt;, &lt;=, &gt;=等比较符
+             java.util.regex.Pattern pattern = java.util.regex.Pattern.compile("(.+?)\\s*(==|!=|&lt;=|&gt;=|&lt;|&gt;)\\s*(.+)");
+             java.util.regex.Matcher matcher = pattern.matcher(attrExpr);
+ 
+             if (matcher.matches()) {
+                 req.setAttrCode(matcher.group(1).trim());
+                 req.setAttrComparator(matcher.group(2).trim());
+                 req.setAttrValue(matcher.group(3).trim());
+             } else {
+                 throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid attribute expression format: " + attrExpr);
+             }
+ 
+             reqs.add(req);
+         }
+ 
+         return reqs;
+     }
+ 
+     /**
+      * 基于部件约束进行推理推荐
+      *
+      * @param partCode      部件代码
+      * @param partCategory  部件类别
+      * @param constraintReqs 约束请求字符串数组
+      * @return 推荐的模块实例列表
+      */
+     protected List&lt;ModuleInst&gt; inferRecommend(String partCode, String partCategory, String... constraintReqs) {
+         List&lt;PartConstraintReq&gt; partConstraintReqs = toPartConstraintReqs(partCategory, constraintReqs);
+ 
+         InferParasReq req = new InferParasReq();
+         req.setModuleId(getModule().getId());
+         req.setEnumerateAllSolution(isEnumerateAllSolution());
+         req.setPartConstraintReqs(partConstraintReqs);
+ 
+         // 如果提供了partCode，设置为主部件
+         if (partCode != null &amp;&amp; !partCode.isEmpty()) {
+             PartInst mainPartInst = new PartInst();
+             mainPartInst.setCode(partCode);
+             req.setMainPartInst(mainPartInst);
+         }
+ 
+         Result&lt;List&lt;ModuleInst&gt;&gt; result = ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.inferParas(req);
+         log.info("Inference recommend result: {}", result);
+         setResult(result);
+         setSolutions(result.getData());
+         return getSolutions();
+     }
  }
```

</details>

</tool-use>
